aggressive.label: Aggressive
aggressive.description: Rapid cuts, punch-in zooms, captions on every beat. High energy.

cinematic.label: Cinematic
cinematic.description: Longer shots, subtle moves, sparse captions, deliberate arc.

reaction.label: Reaction
reaction.description: Story arc that emphasizes the post-peak reaction beat.

competitive.label: Competitive
competitive.description: Gameplay-first, minimal captions, no gimmick zooms. Skill on display.

viralGaming.label: Viral Gaming
viralGaming.description: Instant hook, tight build, big payoff. Broad-appeal gaming Short.

note: Named editing-parameter presets, not real-creator fingerprints. Source: apps/lantern-garage/lib/editor-v12.js
